title: Putin’s fuel shortage admission signals growing strain on Russia’s energy infrastructure
summary_full: Putin's comments mark the first time he has detailed the extent to which Ukraine's deep-strike successes have hampered Russia's fuel production.
summary_public: Putin's comments mark the first time he has detailed the extent to which Ukraine's deep-strike successes have hampered Russia's fuel production.
